title: Sunehri Yaadein
desc: A comprehensive compilation of musical hits and songs composed and performed by legendary Bollywood singers and artists.

title: Filmi Gaane
desc: A comprehensive compilation of Bollywood songs composed and performed by legendary musical artists is played back to back.

title: Gaanon ki Daraaz Se
desc: Host Manoj Muntashir, a renowned lyricist and vocalist, plays classic tracks and shares the unknown tales of the beloved songs and artists.

title: Golden Classics
desc: The host revisits and reviews classic Hindi films and their music, before sharing interesting trivia about their making.

title: Is Duniya Ke Sitare
desc: The host engages in a conversation with the popular celebrities of the entertainment industry about their personal lives and a variety of other topics.

title: Kaajal
desc: Rajesh's marriage takes a drastic turn when his wife's insecurity fuels a vendetta against Madhavi, his dear childhood friend.

desc: The host engages in a conversation with the popular celebrities of the entertainment industry about their personal lives and a variety of other topics.

title: Don
desc: Don, a wanted criminal, succumbs to his injuries in a police chase. Things take a turn when Vijay, a lookalike of Don, replaces him and tries to trace the details of his illegal activities.

desc: A comprehensive compilation of Bollywood songs composed and performed by legendary musical artists is played back to back.

title: Khubsoorat
desc: An authoritative Nirmala runs her household with utmost strictness. However, when Manju, her daughter-in-law's sister, comes to visit, chaos ensues.

title: Evergreen Mix
desc: A compilation of the promos of various movies that give an insight into their storylines while providing a behind-the-scenes look at their making.

title: Do Anjaane
desc: Amit is found on the railway tracks, mortally wounded and suffering from amnesia, after which a wealthy couple adopts him. However, six years later, he regains his memory after watching a film.
